zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Lascelles於大約1232年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Thomas de Maunby40歲，母親Avice Lascelles24歲。他於1264年與Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Lascelles于大约1232年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Maunby40岁，母亲Avice Lascelles24岁。他于1264年与Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年在英国英格兰越可爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Lascelles was born about 1232, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas de Maunby, was 40 and his mother, Avice Lascelles, was 24. He married Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke in 1264, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1297, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Lascelles est né environ 1232, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Maunby, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Avice Lascelles, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke en 1264, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1297, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Lascellesが約1232年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Maunbyは40歳，母Avice Lascellesは24歳であった。1264年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでIsabel FitzThomas Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Lascelles(이)가 대략 1232년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Maunby(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Lascelles(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1264년 영국 요르크실르에서 Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Lascelles родился около 1232 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Maunby было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice Lascelles, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke в 1264 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1297 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
